name: apple-reminders
description: Use macOS Reminders through local EventKit and AppleScript helpers with triage, recurrence, update, and lifecycle commands.

interface.shortDescription: Read, triage, update, and complete Reminders on macOS
interface.longDescription: Use a local Apple Reminders skill and helper script to inspect lists, review due, overdue, and alarm-driven reminders, add recurring reminders, update reminder details, move reminders between lists, flag or unflag them, and mark reminders complete from Codex on macOS.
defaultPrompt: Show my due, overdue, and alarm reminders for today.
Add a reminder for tomorrow at 9 AM in To Do.
Move a reminder to another list and mark it done.
